'''âz-l-g''' ('''zalaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xdress|xdress]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xdress|xdress]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-l-g
|-
! Lemma
| zalaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zalagithi|zalagithi]] || [[word:zalagiji|zalagiji]] || [[word:zalagishi|zalagishi]] || [[word:zalagi|zalagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalaguthuth|zalaguthuth]] || [[word:zalagujuj|zalagujuj]] || [[word:zalagushush|zalagushush]] || [[word:zalag|zalag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalaguthu|zalaguthu]] || [[word:zalaguju|zalaguju]] || [[word:zalagushu|zalagushu]] || [[word:zalagu|zalagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalagufuth|zalagufuth]] || [[word:zalagufuj|zalagufuj]] || [[word:zalagufush|zalagufush]] || [[word:zalaguf|zalaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zalagethe|zalagethe]] || [[word:zalageje|zalageje]] || [[word:zalageshe|zalageshe]] || [[word:zalage|zalage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalagothoth|zalagothoth]] || [[word:zalagojoj|zalagojoj]] || [[word:zalagoshosh|zalagoshosh]] || [[word:zalag|zalag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalagotho|zalagotho]] || [[word:zalagojo|zalagojo]] || [[word:zalagosho|zalagosho]] || [[word:zalago|zalago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalagofoth|zalagofoth]] || [[word:zalagofoj|zalagofoj]] || [[word:zalagofosh|zalagofosh]] || [[word:zalagof|zalagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zalagĂŠthĂŠ|zalagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zalagĂŠjĂŠ|zalagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zalagĂŠshĂŠ|zalagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zalagĂŠ|zalagĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalagathath|zalagathath]] || [[word:zalagajaj|zalagajaj]] || [[word:zalagashash|zalagashash]] || [[word:zalag|zalag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalagatha|zalagatha]] || [[word:zalagaja|zalagaja]] || [[word:zalagasha|zalagasha]] || [[word:zalaga|zalaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalagafath|zalagafath]] || [[word:zalagafaj|zalagafaj]] || [[word:zalagafash|zalagafash]] || [[word:zalagaf|zalagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zalagasha|zalagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozalagasha|gozalagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizalagasha|gokizalagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zalagnĂŒsha|zalagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozalagnknĂŒsha|gozalagnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizalagnĂŒsha|gokizalagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zalagshĂ«sha|zalagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozalagnkshĂ«sha|gozalagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizalagshĂ«sha|gokizalagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalagrosha|zalagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalagnkrosha|gozalagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalagrosha|gokizalagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zalagmusha|zalagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalagnkmusha|gozalagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalagmusha|gokizalagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zalagsherasha|zalagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozalagnksherasha|gozalagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizalagsherasha|gokizalagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zalagngasha|zalagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozalagnkngasha|gozalagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizalagngasha|gokizalagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zalagyasha|zalagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozalagnkyasha|gozalagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizalagyasha|gokizalagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zalagyamasha|zalagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozalagnkyamasha|gozalagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizalagyamasha|gokizalagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zalagnĂŒshĂ«sha|zalagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozalagnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozalagnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizalagnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizalagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalagnĂŒrosha|zalagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalagnknĂŒrosha|gozalagnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalagnĂŒrosha|gokizalagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zalagnĂŒmusha|zalagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalagnknĂŒmusha|gozalagnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalagnĂŒmusha|gokizalagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zalagshĂ«nĂŒsha|zalagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozalagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozalagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizalagshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizalagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalagshĂ«rosha|zalagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalagnkshĂ«rosha|gozalagnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalagshĂ«rosha|gokizalagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zalagshĂ«musha|zalagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalagnkshĂ«musha|gozalagnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalagshĂ«musha|gokizalagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zalagronĂŒsha|zalagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozalagnkronĂŒsha|gozalagnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizalagronĂŒsha|gokizalagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zalagroshĂ«sha|zalagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozalagnkroshĂ«sha|gozalagnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizalagroshĂ«sha|gokizalagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zalagromusha|zalagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalagnkromusha|gozalagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalagromusha|gokizalagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zalagmunĂŒsha|zalagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozalagnkmunĂŒsha|gozalagnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizalagmunĂŒsha|gokizalagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zalagmushĂ«sha|zalagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozalagnkmushĂ«sha|gozalagnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizalagmushĂ«sha|gokizalagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalagmurosha|zalagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalagnkmurosha|gozalagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalagmurosha|gokizalagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zalag|zalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zĂŠlĂŠg|zĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozalag|hozalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozĂŠlĂŠg|hozĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozalag|hohozalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozĂŠlĂŠg|hohozĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzalag|nĂŒzalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzĂŠlĂŠg|nĂŒzĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzalag|nĂŒnĂŒzalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠlĂŠg|nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzalag|nĂŻzalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzĂŠlĂŠg|nĂŻzĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzalag|nĂŻnĂŻzalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠlĂŠg|nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzalag|luzalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzĂŠlĂŠg|luzĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzalag|luluzalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzĂŠlĂŠg|luluzĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizalag|lizalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizĂŠlĂŠg|lizĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizalag|lilizalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizĂŠlĂŠg|lilizĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozalag|kozalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozĂŠlĂŠg|kozĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozalag|kokozalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozĂŠlĂŠg|kokozĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezalag|kezalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezĂŠlĂŠg|kezĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezalag|kekezalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezĂŠlĂŠg|kekezĂŠlĂŠg]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
